summary: Representative issue #58549 was open in the job file but is now closed as implemented on April 25, 2026. The remaining live canonical for the same narrower replay-after-error dedupe family is linked issue #69303. The hydrated scope is over-broad and splits into separate subfamilies (inbound replay/dedupe, Telegram polling/startup, compaction/session overflow, and hot-reload delivery). Because hydrated issue #60646 is security-sensitive, I emitted no mutating GitHub actions.

actions.reason: #58549 is now historical evidence only; #69303 is the best live canonical for the remaining replay-after-error dedupe gap.

needs_human: Security boundary: hydrated issue #60646 contains secret-leakage evidence and must stay routed to central OpenClaw security handling. The artifact also flags linked PR #1 as security-sensitive, so this run should remain non-mutating.
